questions.question: Explain the five essential characteristics of cloud computing as defined by NIST. Provide examples for each.
keyPoints: On-Demand Self-Service: provision without human interaction
Broad Network Access: access from any device via standard protocols
Resource Pooling: multi-tenant model with location independence

questions.question: Describe how 'Rapid Elasticity' helps businesses handle variable workloads. Explain horizontal vs vertical scaling.
